name: Lobster Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lobster in the shell, or 1 lb lobster meat
1 small head romaine lettuce, washed and leaves separated
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare lobster in the shell, place the lobster in boiling water and boil until meat is tender, about 20 minutes. Cool the lobster, remove the meat from the shell, and cut into 1-inch cubes. You may also purchase lobster meat from the seafood department at the supermarket.
2. Wash, but do not peel the potatoes. Boil the potatoes in water until tender, about 15 to 20 minutes. Drain, cool, and quarter.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining dressing ingredients: low-fat yogurt, chopped tarragon, scallions, and fresh ground pepper.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the lobster meat and potatoes. Add the dressing to the mixture and mix well.
5. To serve, place lettuce leaves on plates. Spoon the lobster salad over the lettuce.
